title: Robinhood Reports Third Quarter 2024 Results
text: Robinhood reported record-breaking third quarter results with exceptional growth across all key metrics. Q3 2024 Financial Highlights: Revenue of $637 million, up 36% year-over-year, reaching the second-highest in company history. Adjusted EBITDA reached $268 million, nearly doubling with 42% margins, representing a 13-point margin expansion. Assets Under Custody: Set a new all-time record of $152 billion, up 76% year-over-year. Net Deposits: $10 billion for the third consecutive quarter. Transaction Volume Growth: Transaction-based revenues surged 72%, with options volumes up 47% year-over-year to a new record, equity volumes up 65%, and crypto volumes exceeding 100% growth. Product Innovations: Launch of Robinhood Legend desktop platform that filled 1,000 beta slots in 45 seconds. Introduction of Index Options with $0.50 pricing and Futures contracts at $0.75 per contract. Gold Subscribers: Reached 2.2 million, representing consistent growth momentum. Gold Card: Showed strong demand with approximately 95% retention after first transactions. Customer Engagement: Strong indicators of platform engagement and user satisfaction driving sequential growth.
